channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In photos: Jesse Jackson's life, activism and politics
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson died Tuesday after a career in activism and politics during a national transformation in civil rights and inequality, where he ...

item.title: Civil rights icon Jesse Jackson dies at 84
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson , a civil rights icon who spent his career fighting against racial inequality and injustice, and who made two historic runs for...

item.title: The narrow slice of data that worries biosecurity experts
item.description: Researchers from Johns Hopkins, Oxford, Stanford, Columbia and NYU are calling for guardrails on certain infectious disease datasets that could enable...

item.title: The AI trade is swallowing the market
item.description: AI is concentrating stocks, bonds, private credit â and even the broader economy â around a single bet. Why it matters: Tech companies are projected t...

item.title: Trump directs federal government to intervene in Potomac sewage spill
item.description: President Donald Trump said the federal government would help with an incident that poured 200 million gallons of raw sewage into the Potomac River.

item.title: Jesse Jackson, a leading African American voice on global stage, dies at 84
item.description: As a civil rights activist, he joined the Rev. Martin Luther King Jr. in Selma, Alabama, and Memphis. He later launched two historic presidential camp...

item.title: Aliens are âreal,â Obama says, as Washington shrugs

item.title: Judge orders slavery exhibit to be restored after Trump administration removal
item.description: A GOP-appointed federal judge in Pennsylvania has ordered the Trump administration to restore displays about slavery to a George Washington site in Ph...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with âThe Emperor of All Maladiesâ author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
